body_txt: Conspicuous Consumption is generally expected when someone has the ownership of a Fiction 500 company, and you can assume anything they do spend is actually funded by that company or can serve as a tax write-off. But Luxury Tropes are not just for the super-wealthy and you may find a character capable of financing any scheme at hand regardless of their apparent personal net worth . This is especially notable when a character is Affluent Ascetic , their money initially just seemed to be a comfy inheritance, they don't seem to be employed or their job is just ill-defined . Symptoms of this trope may include: Unfortunate side effects may include: The amount of money in the account is probably Undisclosed Funds , as in “Wow, that’s a whole lot of money!” Contrast Perpetual Poverty .
